hooks.command: CMD=$(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'mkdir' || exit 0; TARGET=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oE 'mkdir[^;|&]*' | sed 's/mkdir *-p *//;s/mkdir *//' | tr -d '"' | xargs); echo "$TARGET" | grep -qE 'openspec/?$|openspec/(specs|changes|schemas)/?$' && echo 'BLOCK: Do not mkdir openspec directories. Use: cd <project> && openspec init --tools claude --force' && exit 2; exit 0

CMD=$(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'openspec init' || exit 0; echo 'openspec init detected — verify openspec/config.yaml has schema: spec-driven-with-adr (not spec-driven).'
